title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive, Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement with Eurolink Network International Corporation, an Information Technology Service Provider, for the Provision of Electronic Claims (e-claims) Utility Framework of Los Baños Municipal Health Office Health Care Institution (HCI) As Part of the Requirements for Philhealth Accreditation. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON , 9/5/2022)
